From Bihar's Paddy Fields to Tables Across the World

SkyRice Global imports, exports, processes and polishes rice — sourced directly from farmers and dealers, and supplied to businesses and households, across India and overseas.

Our Story

Built on the Floor of the Bazar Samiti

SkyRice Global is run from Sasaram's Bazar Samiti — one of Bihar's busiest grain markets — where founder Akash Kushwaha has spent years on the trading floor, buying paddy and milled rice directly from farmers and dealers across the region.

What began as daily trade in the mandi has grown into a full operation: our own processing and polishing line, a quality-checked warehouse, and supply relationships with dealers, businesses and households across India — alongside export partners overseas.

"Every sack that leaves our warehouse has been checked, weighed and graded the same way we'd want it checked if we were buying it ourselves." Akash Kushwaha, Founder, SkyRice Global
Direct from the field

How It Moves

From Field to Freight, Lot by Lot

Every batch is tracked from the mandi floor to the warehouse shelf — so buyers always know where their rice has come from, and what's gone into it.

01 — Sourcing

Direct from farmers & dealers

Paddy and rice bought directly from farmers and grain dealers across Bihar's paddy belt, weighed and recorded at Sasaram Bazar Samiti.

02 — Processing & Polishing

Milled, sorted, graded

Cleaned, de-husked, optically sorted and polished to retail, wholesale and export specifications at our own facility.

03 — Storage & Inspection

Held, labelled, open to check

Graded lots are bagged, labelled and stored in our warehouse — open for buyer inspection any day of the week.

04 — Distribution & Export

To dealers, homes & overseas

Dispatched to dealers, retailers and households across India, and shipped to international buyers through port partners.

Our Varieties

Rice for Every Order Book

From export-grade aged basmati to bulk parboiled and broken rice for industrial buyers — graded, packed and ready to move.

Lot — BAS · Export Grade

Premium Basmati

Long-grain, aged basmati — our flagship variety for international buyers, premium dealers and discerning households.

Lot — SM · Everyday

Sona Masoori

Light, aromatic, everyday rice — a steady favourite with retail dealers, restaurants and home kitchens.

Lot — PB · Bulk & Institutional

Parboiled / Steam Rice

Processed for longer shelf life and higher yield — preferred by bulk buyers, canteens and institutions.

Lot — BRK · Industrial

Broken Rice & By-Products

Broken rice, bran and husk for feed mills, food processing and other industrial use.

Custom grading, blends and packaging sizes — from 1 kg retail packs to bulk export bags — available on request.

Both Sides of the Ledger

We Buy Direct. We Sell Direct.

SkyRice Global trades on both sides of the market — sourcing from the field and the mandi, and supplying everyone from international dealers to a single household.

What We Source

Buying
  • Paddy bought directly from farmers at fair mandi rates
  • Milled rice purchased from local grain dealers & mandi traders
  • Open buying at Sasaram Bazar Samiti, every trading day

Who We Supply

Selling
  • Wholesale dealers & distributors (bulk, B2B)
  • Retail shops, restaurants & businesses (B2B)
  • Individual households — bulk or small-pack orders (B2C)
  • Export & international trading partners

See For Yourself

An Open-Door Warehouse, All 7 Days

Quality isn't just promised on paper. Buyers — dealer or individual — are welcome to visit our warehouse and processing unit at Sasaram Bazar Samiti, inspect stock, check grading, and see exactly what they're buying.

Open 7 Days · Walk-Ins Welcome
Visit the warehouse Sasaram Bazar Samiti, Sasaram, Rohtas District, Bihar Inspection hours Every day of the week — call ahead to plan a visit
